item.title: Ask HN: Which model do you use with Pi coding agent?
item.summary: I use Pi coding agent with OpenAI GPT-5.6 Sol but have been finding that GPT-5.6 is slower than Claude Code. Do you use any other model like one of the hosted OSS ones? Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48991997 Points: 1 # Comments: 0
